overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dirt trail through a grassy field at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring dark atmospheric lighting with trees lining the left side and open fields to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through grassy field at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path using a flashlight to illuminate the way ahead

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with small rocks and uneven surface illuminated by flashlight
cluster of deciduous trees and dense bushes lining the left side of the path
tall wild grass field extending to the right of the trail
dark starry night sky with faint clouds visible above the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward continuously along a narrow dirt trail through a grassy field at night. A flashlight beam illuminates the path ahead, revealing the textured ground and vegetation while trees pass by on the left side. The environment remains consistent throughout, with no other entities or significant changes occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate dirt trail through a dark, grassy field at night. It begins with a narrow flashlight beam cutting through the darkness, revealing the rough texture of the ground and low-lying vegetation. As the camera advances, the light steadily illuminates the path ahead while a line of silent trees passes by on the left. The scene maintains a consistent, atmospheric tension as the camera pushes deeper into the void, with the beam of light serving as the only guide through the unchanging nocturnal landscape.
